---
name: Bug report
about: Skill generates broken, unsafe, or API-incorrect output
title: "[bug] "
labels: bug
---

## Where

- [ ] Claude Code
- [ ] Cursor
- [ ] Codex / Codex CLI
- [ ] OpenAI API / Anthropic API direct
- [ ] Other (specify):

## BotForge version
`v1.x.y` — see `plugin.json` or `docs/CHANGELOG.md`.

## Prompt / command used
```
BotForge: <mode>
Задача: ...
```

## Expected behavior
What the skill should have produced (cite relevant reference / rule).

## Actual behavior
Paste the problematic output (trim to the relevant fragment; redact secrets).

## Which rule was violated?
E.g. "handler contains business logic (should be in services/)" or "payment webhook is not idempotent".

## Reproducibility
- [ ] Every time
- [ ] Sometimes
- [ ] Once
